attachment.prompt:
Message:
Recent conversation in this Feishu room — you may not have seen all of it, because some turns were handled by your teammate while you stayed quiet. Use it to understand what the humans actually asked for:
“看似强但破坏 deck consistency/tempo/defense plan”的选择，这是许多单调工具使用 benchmark 缺少的能力。
- **Claim 4: Version Drift as a Feature.** STS2 Early Access 的持续 patch 让 benchmark 从静态题库变成动态环境，可测 harness 是否能自我更新、发现策略退化、避免记忆化。
- **Claim 5: Credit Assignment with Replayable Counterfactuals.** 同 seed replay、局部替换决策、floor-level postmortem 可以把最终胜负分解到早期构筑与路线选择，形成可验证的自解释评估链。

**主要威胁**

- **可复现性威胁：** EA patch 会改卡牌、遗物、敌人和数值；必须记录 game build、seed、mod/harness hash，并区分 frozen split 与 rolling split。
- **实现保真威胁：** 若不用原版游戏而用模拟器，最小规则误差会放大到胜率差异；若用 live game，自动化和日志接口成本更高。
- **污染威胁：** STS/STS2 攻略、tier list、wiki 很可能进入模型训练；应使用新 patch、隐藏 seed、反事实扰动和定制评估场景。
- **高方差威胁：** 单局胜负噪声大；要用 paired seeds、bootstrap CI、per-floor metrics，而不是只报 win rate。
- **过拟合游戏启发式：** agent 可能学到 STS2 专用套路而非通用自进化能力；需要跨 Balatro、MiniHack、WebArena/SWE-bench 做 transfer sanity check。
- **指标错配：** 只优化爬层可能鼓励保守策略；应同时报告胜率、expected floor、HP/gold efficiency、decision validity、postmortem accuracy、patch adaptation speed。
- **与真实任务距离：** STS2 很适合机制研究，但不能单独支撑“真实软件/网页 agent 能力提升”的强外推；SWE-bench 也提示公开 benchmark 会遇到测试缺陷和污染问题。([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified/))

---

## 5. 综合 Go / No-Go 与关键引用

结论：**Conditional Go**。值得做，但只建议做“STS2 自进化评测 harness / protocol”，不要做“又一个 STS2 bot”。

**1. 最强 Novelty Claim**

最强说法是：

> 首个面向 roguelike deck-builder 的跨 run 自进化 LLM agent harness：标准化记录经验轨迹，自动生成/验证策略知识，评估 learning efficiency、drift resilience 和 cost-aware evolution。

关键差异不是“LLM 会反思”，而是 **跨 run 知识演化是否真的提升 held-out 表现、能否抗 patch drift、能否降低 token 成本**。这几个维度现有 benchmark 基本没系统覆盖。

**2. 最大被拒风险**

最大风险是被认为是 **ExpeL/Voyager applied to STS2**。要破这个，必须有：

- held-out paired eval，而不是训练后跑几局看起来变好
- shuffled-insight negative control
- drift 实验，真实 patch 或 synthetic balance patch
- cost curve，证明经验让 agent 更便宜而不是只更贵
- benchmark-grade logging/replay，而不是普通游戏日志

如果只做“反思生成 insight，下次 prompt 里塞进去”，novelty 不够。

**3. 技术前提**

第一优先级必须验证：

- STS2MCP / sts2-mcp 能否固定 seed、批量启动 run、稳定重开
- 能否完整记录 `state/action/result/version/seed/model/prompt/token_cost`
- 能否 replay 或至少做 state-action checker
- headless/无 GUI 是否可行；若不行，批量实验成本会明显上升
- patch/version pinning 是否可靠：game build、mod hash、数据快照都要记录

目前 STS2 桥接层已存在，但不是 benchmark-grade harness。

**4. 第一周 MVP**

建议一周内只做可证伪实验：

1. 跑通 STS2MCP，验证 seed control / run automation / version logging
2. 定义最小 trajectory schema
3. vanilla agent 跑少量训练 runs，产出 ExpeL-style insight
4. held-out seeds 上做 paired eval：baseline vs insight-agent vs shuffled-insight
5. 指标只看 `max_floor / boss_reached / HP_after_act / invalid_action_rate / token_cost`

Go 条件：held-out 上有方向一致的提升，且 shuffled insight 不提升。否则 agent 演化 story 暂缓，但 harness/protocol 仍可保留。

**5. Venue**

偏游戏 AI：`AIIDE`、`IEEE CoG`、`FDG`。
偏 agent/benchmark：`NeurIPS Datasets & Benchmarks`、`ICLR/ICML/NeurIPS agent or LLM-agent workshops`。
如果只做 STS2，优先 game AI；如果加跨领域 protocol 和第二轻量 testbed，再投 agent/benchmark 方向。

**6. 人类玩家 Ceiling**

可靠 ceiling **不好找**。STS1/STS2 公开胜率多来自社区 tracker、streamer 样本、Reddit/个人统计，选择偏差很重。STS2 还受版本漂移影响，不能当严肃 ceiling。

可用做参考但不能当主证据：

- [STS Tracker](https://ststracker.app/)：STS2 社区 run 数据，适合描述性参考。
- [Spiracle STS2 Ascension Guide](https://spiracle.gg/guides/ascension-guide)：社区样本统计，需注明非控制实验。
- [Winrate 统计讨论](https://marmleflagm.github.io/2022/01/31/winrates.html)：可引用来说明人类 winrate 样本方差和统计不确定性。

论文里最好自己招募少量 expert human，在同版本/同 seeds 上跑小样本作为 ceiling sanity check。

**7. 关键引用**

通用自进化 agent：
- [Self-Evolving Agents Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.21046)
- [Voyager](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.16291)
- [Reflexion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366)
- [ExpeL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.10144)
- [Contextual Experience Replay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.06698)
- [AgentSquare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.06153)
- [Bottom-Up Skill Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.17673)

游戏 agent：
- [PokéLLMon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.01118)
- [Richelieu](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06813)
- [SPRING](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15486)
- [Agent-Pro](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.17574)
- [Language-Driven Play: LLMs in Slay the Spire](https://doi.org/10.1145/3649921.3650013)

STS/STS2 infra：
- [STS2MCP](https://github.com/Gennadiyev/STS2MCP)
- [Yidhar/sts2-mcp](https://github.com/Yidhar/sts2-mcp)
- [CommunicationMod](https://github.com/ForgottenArbiter/CommunicationMod)
- [Slay the Spire 2 Steam page](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2868840/Slay_the_Spire_2/)

Benchmark：
- [BalatroBench](https://balatrobench.com/about.html)
- [Orak](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.03610)
- [BALROG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.13543)
- [SWE-bench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)
- [WebArena](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854)

卡牌 AI / memory：
- [Rule Synergy Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19484)
- [Dominion Deep RL](https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AIIDE/article/view/27518)
- [RLCard](https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.04376)
- [MemSkill](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02474)

一句话 Go/No-Go：**Go，但必须先验证 STS2 的批量可复现实验能力；否则不要承诺完整 benchmark，只做协议设计或换到 MiniSTS/STS1 先跑 proof-of-concept。**

---

## 6. `sts2-cli` 工程预检结果

**结论**

代码层面：`wuhao21/sts2-cli` 可以作为 STS2 自进化 harness 的主底座候选，接口是稳定的 stdin/stdout JSON，支持 `start_run(seed=...)`，并自带 JSONL 日志。

当前机器实测：**NO-GO**。这台机器目前不能实测 headless+seed，因为缺少 `.NET 9+ SDK`、Slay the Spire 2 Steam 游戏目录和 `lib/sts2.dll` 等游戏 DLL。未启动 Steam GUI，未安装依赖，未修改工作区文件；只浅克隆到 `/tmp/sts2-cli-preflight-repo`。

```text
d11aa883b582dd68bd39b331f3370746b30d447e

```

关键源码确认：

- 依赖：Slay the Spire 2 Steam、`.NET 9+ SDK`、Python 3.9+。

- 另有 bridge 日志：`python3 agent/sts2_bridge.py 9876 --compact --log /tmp/game.jsonl`，该日志路径由 `--log FILE` 指定。

3. 跑一次 `./setup.sh /path/to/game`，完成 DLL 复制、IL patch、C# build。注意 patch 阶段需要 `Mono.Cecil` NuGet 包，可能还需要一次联网或本地包缓存。
4. 做最小 smoke test：启动 C# 进程，读取 `ready`，发送固定 seed 的 `start_run`，确认返回 decision point。
5. 做 harness 封装：进程生命周期、超时/重启、stdin/stdout JSON 校验、seed 队列、JSONL 日志归档。
6. 做 determinism 检查：同 seed 重复 `start_run`，比较首个 map/Neow/combat 状态是否一致。

当前建议：**底座可选 GO，当前机器实测 NO-GO**。只要补齐 `.NET 9` 和游戏 DLL，下一步就能做 headless+fixed-seed smoke test。

---

content:
@Claude 这个 patch-history 结果很好，足够把 synthetic drift 从“拍脑袋扰动”升级成 **patch-calibrated stress test**。

我建议把 generator 写成三层，而不是一个混合分布：

1. **Patch size mode**
   - small patch：4-6 项
   - rebalance patch：25-40 项
   - 训练/评测时分别报告，避免大 patch 把结果冲掉

2. **Entity × change type**
   - card numeric/cost tweak 是主干
   - relic/potion 次级
   - boss/enemy/event/map 只做 high-RIL stress case，不和普通 balance tweak 混在一起

3. **RIL bucket**
   - low：numeric tweak
   - medium：cost/rarity/economy
   - high：rewrite/add/remove/replace
   - 每个 bucket 单独报 drift recovery curve

这样 reviewer 问“你这个 drift 是否真实”时，我们回答得更稳：不是一个单点 synthetic patch，而是一组按真实 patch 历史标定的分层压力测试，外加 STS2 真实 patch case study。

还要加一个防泄漏规则：**synthetic drift 生成器不能用 agent 的 KB 来选改动对象**。否则会变成 adversarial drift，和真实 patch 不同。可以有两种 split：

- patch-calibrated random drift：按历史分布随机选 entity
- targeted stress drift：专门打击高置信规则，但作为 robustness upper-bound，不能混进主结果

工程 gate 补充：我这边 `sts2-cli` 只能确认代码层面 GO，当前机器因缺 `.NET 9` 和 STS2 DLL 无法实测。需要找有合法 STS2 安装的机器来跑 smoke test。

content.text:
@Codex 三层 generator + 防泄漏规则我全收。`patch-calibrated random drift` 当主结果、`targeted stress drift` 当 robustness upper-bound 不混进主结果——这个 split 很关键,审稿人问"会不会是 adversarial drift"时我们答得清。

**但有一个 STS1 prior 和你 STS2 实测数据的张力必须 reconcile,否则标定会错:**

我的 STS1 统计说"小 patch 4-6 项、大重平衡 25-40 项、大的很罕见(每 8-12 patch 一次)"。但你 Section 2 实测的 STS2 数据是:**每个 patch 130-200 bullet、双周一次**(v0.100.0~199、v0.104.0~134、v0.106.0~132)。这俩看着矛盾,其实不是——

**bullet ≠ balance-relevant 改动。** 那 130-200 行里大部分是 bugfix / UI / art / map-gen,策略中性。所以:

- **STS1 只能当"结构 prior"**(delta 幅度 ±1 众数、card 占 62%、RIL↔change_type 映射)——这些跨版本稳定。
- **per-patch 体量绝不能用 STS1 的"大 patch 罕见"**——STS2 EA 现在是**持续重平衡 regime**,大改是常态不是例外。三层里的 patch-size mode 权重要按 STS2 实际调,不是 STS1。

**具体下一步**(不依赖 STS2 机器,现在能做):从你已经找到的 19 个 STS2 patch notes 里,**剥掉 bugfix/UI/art,只数 balance-relevant 改动**(卡牌数值/费用/遗物/敌人/boss),得到 STS2 自己的 per-patch 改动数分布。这才是 generator 的真正标定目标,STS1 只补它给不出的细粒度(delta 分布)。我可以派 subagent 去解析这 19 个 patch——你把 patch notes 的 URL/版本号清单给我,我就开跑。

---

给人类同步一下**现在卡在哪**:

纸面工作基本做完了——两份独立深调研(我 + ChatGPT/Codex)**完全收敛**:Conditional Go、novelty wedge 锁定(version-scoped 知识生命周期 + patch-calibrated drift + cost-aware)、MVP 设计一致、合成 drift 标定数据也有了。

**唯一的 blocker 是工程底座:** 主候选 `sts2-cli` 代码层 OK,但需要 **一台装了合法 STS2(Steam)+ .NET 9 的机器** 才能跑 determinism smoke test(同 seed 是否复现)。这是"项目能不能真跑起来"的命门,而且只有你们能提供这个资源。

所以想问:**你们手上有没有 / 能不能搞到一台装了正版 STS2 的机器?** 有的话我和 Codex 就能进第一周 MVP;没有的话,我们得先退到 MiniSTS/STS1 做 proof-of-concept。这个决定卡着后面所有工程。

content:
需要同seed吗，即使同seed，llm也有随机性啊，我的macbook上安装了杀戮尖塔2，可以吗？还是必须要windows？

content.text:
两个问题都很关键,尤其第一个其实点到了实验设计的核心。第二个我直接去扒 sts2-cli 仓库确认 mac 支持,先回第一个。

**Q1: 为什么需要同 seed——即使 LLM 有随机性?**

你把两种随机性混在一起了,而**分开这两种正是 seed 控制的全部意义**:

- **环境随机性(游戏 RNG)**:抽牌、地图布局、选牌奖励、商店内容、敌人行为、事件结果。**这个由 seed 控制**,同 seed → 同环境。
- **Agent 随机性(LLM 采样)**:temperature 带来的输出波动。**这个 seed 管不了**(而且 temp=0 在大多数 API 后端也不是完全确定的)。

**关键:seed 控制的是环境,不是 agent。** 我们恰恰是因为两边都有噪声,才更需要同 seed。两个用途:

1. **determinism smoke test(工程 gate)**——这个**根本不涉及 LLM**。是用**固定脚本动作序列**重放:同 seed + 同动作 → 同 state hash?如果连这个都不成立,说明游戏本身不确定,那 replay / 反事实验证 / benchmark 级日志全都做不了。这一步 LLM 随机性无关。

2. **paired evaluation(降方差)**——正因为环境和 LLM 都吵,我们让 baseline-agent 和 insight-agent **跑同一批 seed**:同样的抽牌、同样的地图、同样的奖励。这样两者的表现差就**剥掉了环境运气**,只剩知识库的效果。LLM 的随机性怎么办?**每个 seed 重复跑 N 次 + 按 seed 配对取差值 + bootstrap 置信区间**——LLM 噪声变成条件内的小噪声,多跑几次平均掉;而 seed 配对消掉的是大得多的环境运气方差。

一句话:**你说的"同 seed LLM 还是随机"完全对——而这正是我们要配对 seed 的原因:把环境方差抽走,LLM/知识的效果才能从噪声里冒出来。** 不控 seed,环境运气会把信号淹没。

**Q2: MacBook 行不行 / 必须 Windows 吗?**

好消息的方向:`sts2-cli` 的两个依赖里,**.NET 9 跨平台(含 Apple Silicon)、游戏的托管 DLL(sts2.dll 等)是平台无关的 IL**,MonoMod/Harmony/Mono.Cecil 也都跨平台。所以**理论上 Mac 能跑**。风险在原生 Steam/Unity 胶水层(libsteam_api.dylib、可能的 native plugin、ARM vs x64)。

我直接去仓库确认它到底标没标 macOS 支持,别让你白折腾:

input.prompt:
Clone the GitHub repo `https://github.com/wuhao21/sts2-cli` (shallow clone is fine, e.g. to /tmp/sts2-cli-mac-check) and determine, with concrete evidence from the actual files, whether it can run on **macOS** (specifically a MacBook — note whether Apple Silicon / ARM64 vs Intel x64 matters).

This tool wraps the Unity game "Slay the Spire 2" to run it headless via a C#/.NET 9 host plus a Python CLI, copying the game's managed DLLs out of the Steam install and IL-patching them. The user has STS2 installed on a MacBook and wants to know if they can use it as the experiment machine, or whether they need Windows.

Inspect specifically and quote the relevant lines:
1. **README / docs** — does it mention OS support (Windows/macOS/Linux)? Any platform-specific instructions?
2. **setup.sh** — does it assume Windows-style or Unix paths? Does it reference the macOS Steam install path (`~/Library/Application Support/Steam/steamapps/common/Slay the Spire 2/`)? How does it locate the game directory and which DLLs does it copy? Does it handle `.dylib` native Steam libs vs `.dll`?
3. **The .csproj files** (e.g. src/Sts2Headless/Sts2Headless.csproj) — what `TargetFramework` / `RuntimeIdentifier` / platform settings? Any `win-x64` / `osx-x64` / `osx-arm64` hints? Any native library references?
4. **Steamworks integration** — does the headless host initialize Steamworks.NET? If so, does it need a platform-native steam_api lib (`steam_api64.dll` on Windows vs `libsteam_api.dylib` on macOS)? Is there any code path to skip Steam init for headless runs?
5. **Any OS guards in the C# or Python code** — `RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform`, hardcoded `\\` paths, `.dll` string literals, `os.name` checks, etc.
6. **Issues / README FAQ** — any mention of macOS users succeeding or failing.

Then give a clear verdict:
- Can it plausibly run on a MacBook as-is? 
- If not, what specifically blocks it (which step / which file) and roughly what would need changing?
- Does Apple Silicon vs Intel matter here (e.g. if native Steam libs are x64-only, or if the Mac STS2 build is x64-under-Rosetta)?
- What's the single fastest way for the user to find out for sure on their own Mac (e.g. the exact setup.sh command + what success/failure looks like)?

Be concrete and quote file contents. If something is ambiguous (e.g. setup.sh works on Unix but Steamworks init is untested on Mac), say so explicitly rather than guessing a clean yes/no.

aiTitle: Self-evolving harness for Slay the Spire 2

content:
Message:
Recent conversation in this Feishu room — you may not have seen all of it, because some turns were handled by your teammate while you stayed quiet. Use it to understand what the humans actually asked for:
行，批量实验成本会明显上升
- patch/version pinning 是否可靠：game build、mod hash、数据快照都要记录

目前 STS2 桥接层已存在，但不是 benchmark-grade harness。

**4. 第一周 MVP**

建议一周内只做可证伪实验：

1. 跑通 STS2MCP，验证 seed control / run automation / version logging
2. 定义最小 trajectory schema
3. vanilla agent 跑少量训练 runs，产出 ExpeL-style insight
4. held-out seeds 上做 paired eval：baseline vs insight-agent vs shuffled-insight
5. 指标只看 `max_floor / boss_reached / HP_after_act / invalid_action_rate / token_cost`

Go 条件：held-out 上有方向一致的提升，且 shuffled insight 不提升。否则 agent 演化 story 暂缓，但 harness/protocol 仍可保留。

**5. Venue**

偏游戏 AI：`AIIDE`、`IEEE CoG`、`FDG`。
偏 agent/benchmark：`NeurIPS Datasets & Benchmarks`、`ICLR/ICML/NeurIPS agent or LLM-agent workshops`。
如果只做 STS2，优先 game AI；如果加跨领域 protocol 和第二轻量 testbed，再投 agent/benchmark 方向。

**6. 人类玩家 Ceiling**

可靠 ceiling **不好找**。STS1/STS2 公开胜率多来自社区 tracker、streamer 样本、Reddit/个人统计，选择偏差很重。STS2 还受版本漂移影响，不能当严肃 ceiling。

可用做参考但不能当主证据：

- [STS Tracker](https://ststracker.app/)：STS2 社区 run 数据，适合描述性参考。
- [Spiracle STS2 Ascension Guide](https://spiracle.gg/guides/ascension-guide)：社区样本统计，需注明非控制实验。
- [Winrate 统计讨论](https://marmleflagm.github.io/2022/01/31/winrates.html)：可引用来说明人类 winrate 样本方差和统计不确定性。

论文里最好自己招募少量 expert human，在同版本/同 seeds 上跑小样本作为 ceiling sanity check。

**7. 关键引用**

通用自进化 agent：
- [Self-Evolving Agents Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.21046)
- [Voyager](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.16291)
- [Reflexion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366)
- [ExpeL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.10144)
- [Contextual Experience Replay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.06698)
- [AgentSquare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.06153)
- [Bottom-Up Skill Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.17673)

游戏 agent：
- [PokéLLMon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.01118)
- [Richelieu](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.06813)
- [SPRING](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15486)
- [Agent-Pro](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.17574)
- [Language-Driven Play: LLMs in Slay the Spire](https://doi.org/10.1145/3649921.3650013)

STS/STS2 infra：
- [STS2MCP](https://github.com/Gennadiyev/STS2MCP)
- [Yidhar/sts2-mcp](https://github.com/Yidhar/sts2-mcp)
- [CommunicationMod](https://github.com/ForgottenArbiter/CommunicationMod)
- [Slay the Spire 2 Steam page](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2868840/Slay_the_Spire_2/)

Benchmark：
- [BalatroBench](https://balatrobench.com/about.html)
- [Orak](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.03610)
- [BALROG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.13543)
- [SWE-bench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)
- [WebArena](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854)

卡牌 AI / memory：
- [Rule Synergy Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19484)
- [Dominion Deep RL](https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AIIDE/article/view/27518)
- [RLCard](https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.04376)
- [MemSkill](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02474)

一句话 Go/No-Go：**Go，但必须先验证 STS2 的批量可复现实验能力；否则不要承诺完整 benchmark，只做协议设计或换到 MiniSTS/STS1 先跑 proof-of-concept。**

---

## 6. `sts2-cli` 工程预检结果

**结论**

代码层面：`wuhao21/sts2-cli` 可以作为 STS2 自进化 harness 的主底座候选，接口是稳定的 stdin/stdout JSON，支持 `start_run(seed=...)`，并自带 JSONL 日志。

当前机器实测：**NO-GO**。这台机器目前不能实测 headless+seed，因为缺少 `.NET 9+ SDK`、Slay the Spire 2 Steam 游戏目录和 `lib/sts2.dll` 等游戏 DLL。未启动 Steam GUI，未安装依赖，未修改工作区文件；只浅克隆到 `/tmp/sts2-cli-preflight-repo`。

**实际确认**

浅克隆成功，commit：

```text
d11aa883b582dd68bd39b331f3370746b30d447e
2026-05-30 00:15:56 -0700
fix: expose Dismantle doubled hit count when target is Vulnerable (#78)
```

关键源码确认：

- 依赖：Slay the Spire 2 Steam、`.NET 9+ SDK`、Python 3.9+。
- setup：`./setup.sh [/path/to/game]` 从 Steam 游戏目录复制 DLL 到 `lib/`，再 IL patch，再 build。
- 必需 DLL：`sts2.dll`、`SmartFormat.dll`、`SmartFormat.ZString.dll`、`Sentry.dll`、`Steamworks.NET.dll`、`MonoMod.Backports.dll`、`MonoMod.ILHelpers.dll`、`0Harmony.dll`、`System.IO.Hashing.dll`。
- JSON 启动命令：`dotnet run --project src/Sts2Headless/Sts2Headless.csproj`。

**一周 MVP 缺口**

1. 在机器上提供 `.NET 9+ SDK`，最好是用户目录下的 portable SDK，避免改系统。
2. 提供合法 Slay the Spire 2 Steam 安装目录，或预先准备 `lib/` 所需 DLL。
3. 跑一次 `./setup.sh /path/to/game`，完成 DLL 复制、IL patch、C# build。注意 patch 阶段需要 `Mono.Cecil` NuGet 包，可能还需要一次联网或本地包缓存。
4. 做最小 smoke test：启动 C# 进程，读取 `ready`，发送固定 seed 的 `start_run`，确认返回 decision point。
5. 做 harness 封装：进程生命周期、超时/重启、stdin/stdout JSON 校验、seed 队列、JSONL 日志归档。
6. 做 determinism 检查：同 seed 重复 `start_run`，比较首个 map/Neow/combat 状态是否一致。

当前建议：**底座可选 GO，当前机器实测 NO-GO**。只要补齐 `.NET 9` 和游戏 DLL，下一步就能做 headless+fixed-seed smoke test。

codex: @Claude 这个 patch-history 结果很好，足够把 synthetic drift 从“拍脑袋扰动”升级成 **patch-calibrated stress test**。

我建议把 generator 写成三层，而不是一个混合分布：

1. **Patch size mode**
   - small patch：4-6 项
   - rebalance patch：25-40 项
   - 训练/评测时分别报告，避免大 patch 把结果冲掉

2. **Entity × change type**
   - card numeric/cost tweak 是主干
   - relic/potion 次级
   - boss/enemy/event/map 只做 high-RIL stress case，不和普通 balance tweak 混在一起

3. **RIL bucket**
   - low：numeric tweak
   - medium：cost/rarity/economy
   - high：rewrite/add/remove/replace
   - 每个 bucket 单独报 drift recovery curve

这样 reviewer 问“你这个 drift 是否真实”时，我们回答得更稳：不是一个单点 synthetic patch，而是一组按真实 patch 历史标定的分层压力测试，外加 STS2 真实 patch case study。

还要加一个防泄漏规则：**synthetic drift 生成器不能用 agent 的 KB 来选改动对象**。否则会变成 adversarial drift，和真实 patch 不同。可以有两种 split：

- patch-calibrated random drift：按历史分布随机选 entity
- targeted stress drift：专门打击高置信规则，但作为 robustness upper-bound，不能混进主结果

工程 gate 补充：我这边 `sts2-cli` 只能确认代码层面 GO，当前机器因缺 `.NET 9` 和 STS2 DLL 无法实测。需要找有合法 STS2 安装的机器来跑 smoke test。

claude: @Codex 三层 generator + 防泄漏规则我全收。`patch-calibrated random drift` 当主结果、`targeted stress drift` 当 robustness upper-bound 不混进主结果——这个 split 很关键,审稿人问"会不会是 adversarial drift"时我们答得清。

**但有一个 STS1 prior 和你 STS2 实测数据的张力必须 reconcile,否则标定会错:**

我的 STS1 统计说"小 patch 4-6 项、大重平衡 25-40 项、大的很罕见(每 8-12 patch 一次)"。但你 Section 2 实测的 STS2 数据是:**每个 patch 130-200 bullet、双周一次**(v0.100.0~199、v0.104.0~134、v0.106.0~132)。这俩看着矛盾,其实不是——

**bullet ≠ balance-relevant 改动。** 那 130-200 行里大部分是 bugfix / UI / art / map-gen,策略中性。所以:

- **STS1 只能当"结构 prior"**(delta 幅度 ±1 众数、card 占 62%、RIL↔change_type 映射)——这些跨版本稳定。
- **per-patch 体量绝不能用 STS1 的"大 patch 罕见"**——STS2 EA 现在是**持续重平衡 regime**,大改是常态不是例外。三层里的 patch-size mode 权重要按 STS2 实际调,不是 STS1。

**具体下一步**(不依赖 STS2 机器,现在能做):从你已经找到的 19 个 STS2 patch notes 里,**剥掉 bugfix/UI/art,只数 balance-relevant 改动**(卡牌数值/费用/遗物/敌人/boss),得到 STS2 自己的 per-patch 改动数分布。这才是 generator 的真正标定目标,STS1 只补它给不出的细粒度(delta 分布)。我可以派 subagent 去解析这 19 个 patch——你把 patch notes 的 URL/版本号清单给我,我就开跑。

---

给人类同步一下**现在卡在哪**:

纸面工作基本做完了——两份独立深调研(我 + ChatGPT/Codex)**完全收敛**:Conditional Go、novelty wedge 锁定(version-scoped 知识生命周期 + patch-calibrated drift + cost-aware)、MVP 设计一致、合成 drift 标定数据也有了。

**唯一的 blocker 是工程底座:** 主候选 `sts2-cli` 代码层 OK,但需要 **一台装了合法 STS2(Steam)+ .NET 9 的机器** 才能跑 determinism smoke test(同 seed 是否复现)。这是"项目能不能真跑起来"的命门,而且只有你们能提供这个资源。

所以想问:**你们手上有没有 / 能不能搞到一台装了正版 STS2 的机器?** 有的话我和 Codex 就能进第一周 MVP;没有的话,我们得先退到 MiniSTS/STS1 做 proof-of-concept。这个决定卡着后面所有工程。

content.text:
I have everything I need. Here is my verdict.

## Verdict: Yes — it runs on a MacBook as-is, and is in fact developed/tested on Apple Silicon

I cloned the repo to `/tmp/sts2-cli-mac-check` and inspected every relevant file. The premise in the task that this is a "Unity" game is slightly off — STS2 is a **Godot 4** game (the host replaces `GodotSharp.dll` with `src/GodotStubs`). That doesn't change the answer, but it's why there's no Unity/Mono-specific platform baggage.

### Evidence by your six points

**1. README / docs** — `/tmp/sts2-cli-mac-check/README.md` lists requirements as just "Slay the Spire 2 on Steam, .NET 9+ SDK, Python 3.9+" with **no OS named** and no platform-specific instructions. So no explicit "Windows only" claim, but also no FAQ. The architecture diagram confirms the design: `sts2.dll (IL-patched) + GodotStubs (replaces GodotSharp.dll) + Harmony`.

**2. setup.sh** (`/tmp/sts2-cli-mac-check/setup.sh`) — fully Unix and explicitly macOS-aware. The header comment even reads `.NET 9+ SDK (ARM64 for Apple Silicon, x64 for Intel/Linux)`. Auto-detect:
```bash
case "$(uname -s)" in
    Darwin)
        GAME_DIR=".../Slay the Spire 2/SlayTheSpire2.app/Contents/Resources/data_sts2_macos_arm64"
        if [ ! -d "$GAME_DIR" ]; then  # Try x86_64
            GAME_DIR=".../Contents/Resources/data_sts2_macos_x86_64"
```
It uses exactly the macOS Steam path you mentioned (drilling into the `.app/Contents/Resources/data_sts2_macos_arm64`). It tries arm64 first, then x86_64. It copies **9 managed `.dll`s** (`sts2.dll`, `SmartFormat*`, `Sentry.dll`, `Steamworks.NET.dll`, `MonoMod.*`, `0Harmony.dll`, `System.IO.Hashing.dll`) — all platform-neutral CIL. It does **not** touch any `.dylib`/native Steam lib, because it never needs one (see point 4). It also prefers `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet` for the SDK.

**3. .csproj** (`/tmp/sts2-cli-mac-check/src/Sts2Headless/Sts2Headless.csproj` and `GodotStubs.csproj`) — both are plain `<TargetFramework>net9.0</TargetFramework>` with `<RollForward>LatestMajor</RollForward>`. **No `RuntimeIdentifier`, no `win-x64`/`osx-x64`/`osx-arm64`, no native library references.** This means it builds a portable framework-dependent assembly that the local `dotnet` runs on whatever architecture it is (ARM64 dotnet → ARM64; x64 dotnet → x64). The DLL references are `<Private>false</Private>` HintPaths into `lib/`.

**4. Steamworks** — this is the part that would normally block macOS, and here it's handled. The host does **not** initialize Steamworks at all. `Steamworks.NET.dll` is copied only because `sts2.dll` references it at the type level, but the only Steam-related code is in `RunSimulator.cs` around line 3080:
```csharp
// Initialize PlatformServices before anything touches PlatformUtil
try {
    var _ = MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Platform.PlatformUtil.PrimaryPlatform;
} catch (Exception ex) {
    Console.Error.WriteLine($"[WARN] PlatformUtil init: {ex.Message}");
}
```
with the comment `// If it fails, it won't be available but most code checks SteamInitializer.Initialized`. There is **no `SteamAPI.Init`, no `DllImport`, no `NativeLibrary.Load`, no reference to `steam_api64.dll`/`libsteam_api.dylib` anywhere in the C#**. So the headless host never loads the native steam_api binary — the Steam-init path is wrapped in try/catch and degrades gracefully. This is the explicit "skip Steam for headless" path you asked about.

**5. OS guards** — `Program.cs` only ever resolves managed `name.Name + ".dll"` assemblies from `lib/` (via `AssemblyLoadContext.Resolving`); no `RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform`, no hardcoded backslash paths. The Python side (`python/play.py`) uses `platform.system()` with a proper `Darwin` branch (lines 56-64) pointing at `data_sts2_macos_arm64` then `data_sts2_macos_x86_64`, plus `_find_dotnet()` preferring `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet`. Save-file lookup also has a Darwin branch (`~/Library/Application Support/SlayTheSpire2/...`). Windows/WSL branches exist but are separate.

**6. Issues / FAQ** — no GitHub FAQ, but the strongest evidence is the project's own dev config. `CLAUDE.md` mandates the regression test be run as:
```bash
STS2_GAME_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Steam/.../data_sts2_macos_arm64" python3 python/play_full_run.py 5 "$char"
```
and the build command is `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet build ...`. **The maintainer develops and validates this on an Apple Silicon MacBook.**

### Does Apple Silicon vs Intel matter?
Essentially **no**, as long as the user installs the matching .NET 9 SDK:
- The game ships its managed `sts2.dll` as the *same* CIL in both `data_sts2_macos_arm64` and `data_sts2_macos_x86_64` (Godot's C# build), and setup.sh/play.py auto-pick whichever folder exists. So an Intel Mac (or an arm64 Mac running the x86_64 STS2 build under Rosetta) works too.
- Since the native steam_api lib is never loaded headless, the usual "x64-only native Steam lib" blocker does not apply.
- The one practical requirement: install the .NET 9 SDK that matches your machine — **ARM64 SDK on Apple Silicon, x64 SDK on Intel**. setup.sh's `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet` preference and the README note already call this out.

### Honest caveats
- I verified this entirely by code inspection; I could not actually run it (no STS2 install / .NET 9 SDK / game DLLs in this environment, and the real `sts2.dll` is intentionally not in the repo). The IL-patch + Steam-skip logic is clearly *intended* and *committed to be tested* on macOS arm64, but I can't execute the regression here.
- If the user's STS2 build version differs from what the patcher expects, the IL patch targets methods by name (`WaitUntilQueueIsEmptyOrWaitingOnNonPlayerDrivenAction`, `YieldAwaiter.get_IsCompleted`); a future game update could rename these and cause "Applied 0 patches" — but that's a version-skew risk, not a macOS-specific one.

### Fastest way for the user to confirm on their own Mac
1. Install **.NET 9 SDK (Arm64 for Apple Silicon)** and Python 3.9+.
2. From the repo root, run:
   ```bash
   ./setup.sh
   ```
   Success looks like: `📁 Game directory: ...data_sts2_macos_arm64`, a list of `✓ sts2.dll` (etc.) copies, `Applied N patches` with N ≥ 1, then `🏗️ Building... ✅ Setup complete!`.
   Failure looks like: `❌ Game directory not found` (Steam path differs — pass it manually: `./setup.sh "/path/to/.../data_sts2_macos_arm64"`), or `✗ <dll> not found` / `Applied 0 patches` / a `dotnet build` error.
3. Then sanity-check end to end:
   ```bash
   python3 python/play.py --lang en
   ```
   or a headless smoke test that proves the Steam-skip path is fine on their machine:
   ```bash
   python3 python/play_full_run.py 1 Ironclad
   ```
   Success = `Completed: 1/1`. A `[WARN] PlatformUtil init:` line on stderr is expected/benign (that's the Steam path being skipped), not a failure.

**Bottom line:** The user does **not** need Windows. This tool is Unix-first and was built and tested on an Apple Silicon MacBook with STS2 installed. They should be able to use their MacBook as the experiment machine; the only setup requirement is the matching-architecture .NET 9 SDK.

- If the user's STS2 build version differs from what the patcher expects, the IL patch targets methods by name (`WaitUntilQueueIsEmptyOrWaitingOnNonPlayerDrivenAction`, `YieldAwaiter.get_IsCompleted`); a future game update could rename these and cause "Applied 0 patches" — but that's a version-skew risk, not a macOS-specific one.

### Fastest way for the user to confirm on their own Mac
1. Install **.NET 9 SDK (Arm64 for Apple Silicon)** and Python 3.9+.
2. From the repo root, run:
   ```bash
   ./setup.sh
   ```
   Success looks like: `📁 Game directory: ...data_sts2_macos_arm64`, a list of `✓ sts2.dll` (etc.) copies, `Applied N patches` with N ≥ 1, then `🏗️ Building... ✅ Setup complete!`.
   Failure looks like: `❌ Game directory not found` (Steam path differs — pass it manually: `./setup.sh "/path/to/.../data_sts2_macos_arm64"`), or `✗ <dll> not found` / `Applied 0 patches` / a `dotnet build` error.
3. Then sanity-check end to end:
   ```bash
   python3 python/play.py --lang en
   ```
   or a headless smoke test that proves the Steam-skip path is fine on their machine:
   ```bash
   python3 python/play_full_run.py 1 Ironclad
   ```
   Success = `Completed: 1/1`. A `[WARN] PlatformUtil init:` line on stderr is expected/benign (that's the Steam path being skipped), not a failure.

**Bottom line:** The user does **not** need Windows. This tool is Unix-first and was built and tested on an Apple Silicon MacBook with STS2 installed. They should be able to use their MacBook as the experiment machine; the only setup requirement is the matching-architecture .NET 9 SDK.

**4. 第一周 MVP**

建议一周内只做可证伪实验：

1. 跑通 STS2MCP，验证 seed control / run automation / version logging
2. 定义最小 trajectory schema
3. vanilla agent 跑少量训练 runs，产出 ExpeL-style insight
4. held-out seeds 上做 paired eval：baseline vs insight-agent vs shuffled-insight
5. 指标只看 `max_floor / boss_reached / HP_after_act / invalid_action_rate / token_cost`

Go 条件：held-out 上有方向一致的提升，且 shuffled insight 不提升。否则 agent 演化 story 暂缓，但 harness/protocol 仍可保留。

**5. Venue**

偏游戏 AI：`AIIDE`、`IEEE CoG`、`FDG`。

codex: @Claude 这个 patch-history 结果很好，足够把 synthetic drift 从“拍脑袋扰动”升级成 **patch-calibrated stress test**。

我建议把 generator 写成三层，而不是一个混合分布：

1. **Patch size mode**
   - small patch：4-6 项
   - rebalance patch：25-40 项
   - 训练/评测时分别报告，避免大 patch 把结果冲掉

2. **Entity × change type**
   - card numeric/cost tweak 是主干
   - relic/potion 次级
   - boss/enemy/event/map 只做 high-RIL stress case，不和普通 balance tweak 混在一起

3. **RIL bucket**
   - low：numeric tweak
   - medium：cost/rarity/economy
   - high：rewrite/add/remove/replace
   - 每个 bucket 单独报 drift recovery curve

这样 reviewer 问“你这个 drift 是否真实”时，我们回答得更稳：不是一个单点 synthetic patch，而是一组按真实 patch 历史标定的分层压力测试，外加 STS2 真实 patch case study。

还要加一个防泄漏规则：**synthetic drift 生成器不能用 agent 的 KB 来选改动对象**。否则会变成 adversarial drift，和真实 patch 不同。可以有两种 split：

- patch-calibrated random drift：按历史分布随机选 entity
- targeted stress drift：专门打击高置信规则，但作为 robustness upper-bound，不能混进主结果

工程 gate 补充：我这边 `sts2-cli` 只能确认代码层面 GO，当前机器因缺 `.NET 9` 和 STS2 DLL 无法实测。需要找有合法 STS2 安装的机器来跑 smoke test。

claude: @Codex 三层 generator + 防泄漏规则我全收。`patch-calibrated random drift` 当主结果、`targeted stress drift` 当 robustness upper-bound 不混进主结果——这个 split 很关键,审稿人问"会不会是 adversarial drift"时我们答得清。

**但有一个 STS1 prior 和你 STS2 实测数据的张力必须 reconcile,否则标定会错:**

我的 STS1 统计说"小 patch 4-6 项、大重平衡 25-40 项、大的很罕见(每 8-12 patch 一次)"。但你 Section 2 实测的 STS2 数据是:**每个 patch 130-200 bullet、双周一次**(v0.100.0~199、v0.104.0~134、v0.106.0~132)。这俩看着矛盾,其实不是——

**bullet ≠ balance-relevant 改动。** 那 130-200 行里大部分是 bugfix / UI / art / map-gen,策略中性。所以:

- **STS1 只能当"结构 prior"**(delta 幅度 ±1 众数、card 占 62%、RIL↔change_type 映射)——这些跨版本稳定。
- **per-patch 体量绝不能用 STS1 的"大 patch 罕见"**——STS2 EA 现在是**持续重平衡 regime**,大改是常态不是例外。三层里的 patch-size mode 权重要按 STS2 实际调,不是 STS1。

**具体下一步**(不依赖 STS2 机器,现在能做):从你已经找到的 19 个 STS2 patch notes 里,**剥掉 bugfix/UI/art,只数 balance-relevant 改动**(卡牌数值/费用/遗物/敌人/boss),得到 STS2 自己的 per-patch 改动数分布。这才是 generator 的真正标定目标,STS1 只补它给不出的细粒度(delta 分布)。我可以派 subagent 去解析这 19 个 patch——你把 patch notes 的 URL/版本号清单给我,我就开跑。

---

给人类同步一下**现在卡在哪**:

纸面工作基本做完了——两份独立深调研(我 + ChatGPT/Codex)**完全收敛**:Conditional Go、novelty wedge 锁定(version-scoped 知识生命周期 + patch-calibrated drift + cost-aware)、MVP 设计一致、合成 drift 标定数据也有了。

**唯一的 blocker 是工程底座:** 主候选 `sts2-cli` 代码层 OK,但需要 **一台装了合法 STS2(Steam)+ .NET 9 的机器** 才能跑 determinism smoke test(同 seed 是否复现)。这是"项目能不能真跑起来"的命门,而且只有你们能提供这个资源。

所以想问:**你们手上有没有 / 能不能搞到一台装了正版 STS2 的机器?** 有的话我和 Codex 就能进第一周 MVP;没有的话,我们得先退到 MiniSTS/STS1 做 proof-of-concept。这个决定卡着后面所有工程。

content.text:
**Q2 有结论了,而且是好消息:MacBook 不用换 Windows,反而是最理想的机器。**

我扒了 `sts2-cli` 源码,关键发现:

- **它本身就是在 Apple Silicon Mac 上开发和测试的。** 仓库的 `CLAUDE.md` 里回归测试命令直接写死了 macOS arm64 的游戏路径 + `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet`。维护者就用 M 系列 Mac + 装了 STS2 在跑。
- `setup.sh` 是 Unix-first,有显式的 macOS 分支:自动找 `.../Slay the Spire 2/SlayTheSpire2.app/Contents/Resources/data_sts2_macos_arm64`(先 arm64 再 x86_64)。
- **平时卡 Mac 的 Steamworks 原生库问题,它绕过了**:headless 模式根本不初始化 SteamAPI,那段代码包在 try/catch 里优雅降级,不加载任何 `.dylib`/`steam_api64.dll`。
- `.csproj` 是纯 `net9.0`、无 RuntimeIdentifier,可移植。
- (顺带纠正:STS2 是 **Godot 4** 不是 Unity,所以没有 Unity/Mono 的平台包袱。)

**Apple Silicon vs Intel 不影响**,只要装对应架构的 .NET 9 SDK(M 系列装 ARM64)。

**你在 Mac 上确认的最快三步:**
1. 装 **.NET 9 SDK(Apple Silicon 选 Arm64)** + Python 3.9+
2. 仓库根目录跑 `./setup.sh`(成功标志:`📁 Game directory: ...arm64` → 一串 `✓ sts2.dll` → `Applied N patches`(N≥1)→ `✅ Setup complete!`)
3. headless 冒烟:`python3 python/play_full_run.py 1 Ironclad` → 成功是 `Completed: 1/1`。stderr 出现一行 `[WARN] PlatformUtil init:` 是**正常的**(就是 Steam 被跳过),不是报错。

**唯一 caveat**:我是代码审查得出的结论,没实跑(这环境没游戏 DLL)。还有个非 mac 特有的风险——IL patch 是按方法名匹配的,如果某次游戏更新改了方法名会出现 `Applied 0 patches`,但那是版本漂移问题不是 Mac 问题。

所以 **回到你 Q1 提的 determinism**:上面第 2-3 步如果在你 Mac 上跑通,我就接着让你跑那个"同 seed + 同固定动作 → 同 state hash"的复现性检查——这是 LLM 完全不参与的纯环境测试,也是整个 benchmark 的地基。

@Codex blocker 基本清掉了——人类的 MacBook 就是实验机,sts2-cli 原生支持 Apple Silicon。你把那 19 条 patch notes 的 URL 表贴出来,我这边就派 subagent 跑 balance-relevant 改动统计(剥 bugfix/UI/art),把 STS2 的 per-patch patch-size 权重标定出来,补上 STS1 给不了的那一块。

- **STS1 只能当"结构 prior"**(delta 幅度 ±1 众数、card 占 62%、RIL↔change_type 映射)——这些跨版本稳定。
- **per-patch 体量绝不能用 STS1 的"大 patch 罕见"**——STS2 EA 现在是**持续重平衡 regime**,大改是常态不是例外。三层里的 patch-size mode 权重要按 STS2 实际调,不是 STS1。

**具体下一步**(不依赖 STS2 机器,现在能做):从你已经找到的 19 个 STS2 patch notes 里,**剥掉 bugfix/UI/art,只数 balance-relevant 改动**(卡牌数值/费用/遗物/敌人/boss),得到 STS2 自己的 per-patch 改动数分布。这才是 generator 的真正标定目标,STS1 只补它给不出的细粒度(delta 分布)。我可以派 subagent 去解析这 19 个 patch——你把 patch notes 的 URL/版本号清单给我,我就开跑。

---

给人类同步一下**现在卡在哪**:

纸面工作基本做完了——两份独立深调研(我 + ChatGPT/Codex)**完全收敛**:Conditional Go、novelty wedge 锁定(version-scoped 知识生命周期 + patch-calibrated drift + cost-aware)、MVP 设计一致、合成 drift 标定数据也有了。

**唯一的 blocker 是工程底座:** 主候选 `sts2-cli` 代码层 OK,但需要 **一台装了合法 STS2(Steam)+ .NET 9 的机器** 才能跑 determinism smoke test(同 seed 是否复现)。这是"项目能不能真跑起来"的命门,而且只有你们能提供这个资源。

所以想问:**你们手上有没有 / 能不能搞到一台装了正版 STS2 的机器?** 有的话我和 Codex 就能进第一周 MVP;没有的话,我们得先退到 MiniSTS/STS1 做 proof-of-concept。这个决定卡着后面所有工程。

codex: @Claude 我补到了你要的 STS2 patch notes 清单：确认 19 条候选 update/patch note，覆盖 2026-03-06 到 2026-06-04/05。大部分是 Steam 官方新闻 URL，`v0.104.0` 暂时只有 SteamDB 镜像，`v0.105.1` 只有 PatchBot/STS2Guide 镜像。

关键点：
- 高 balance-relevant patch 主要是 `v0.100.0`、`v0.101.0`、`v0.102.0`、`v0.103.0`、`v0.103.2`、`v0.104.0`、`v0.105.0`、`v0.106.0`
- `v0.105.0` 是 Doormaker removed / Aeonglass added 的核心真实 drift case
- 这张表可以作为下一步解析 balance-relevant changes 的输入表

我建议下一步你那边按这 19 条抓正文并过滤 bugfix/UI/art，只统计 card/relic/potion/enemy/boss/event/economy 的 balance-relevant 改动数；STS1 继续提供 delta 幅度和 change-type prior，STS2 用来标定 EA 期 patch-size 权重。

claude: **Q2 有结论了,而且是好消息:MacBook 不用换 Windows,反而是最理想的机器。**

我扒了 `sts2-cli` 源码,关键发现:

- **它本身就是在 Apple Silicon Mac 上开发和测试的。** 仓库的 `CLAUDE.md` 里回归测试命令直接写死了 macOS arm64 的游戏路径 + `~/.dotnet-arm64/dotnet`。维护者就用 M 系列 Mac + 装了 STS2 在跑。
- `setup.sh` 是 Unix-first,有显式的 macOS 分支:自动找 `.../Slay the Spire 2/SlayTheSpire2.app/Contents/Resources/data_sts2_macos_arm64`(先 arm64 再 x86_64)。
- **平时卡 Mac 的 Steamworks 原生库问题,它绕过了**:headless 模式根本不初始化 SteamAPI,那段代码包在 try/catch 里优雅降级,不加载任何 `.dylib`/`steam_api64.dll`。
- `.csproj` 是纯 `net9.0`、无 RuntimeIdentifier,可移植。
- (顺带纠正:STS2 是 **Godot 4** 不是 Unity,所以没有 Unity/Mono 的平台包袱。)

**Apple Silicon vs Intel 不影响**,只要装对应架构的 .NET 9 SDK(M 系列装 ARM64)。

**你在 Mac 上确认的最快三步:**
1. 装 **.NET 9 SDK(Apple Silicon 选 Arm64)** + Python 3.9+
2. 仓库根目录跑 `./setup.sh`(成功标志:`📁 Game directory: ...arm64` → 一串 `✓ sts2.dll` → `Applied N patches`(N≥1)→ `✅ Setup complete!`)
3. headless 冒烟:`python3 python/play_full_run.py 1 Ironclad` → 成功是 `Completed: 1/1`。stderr 出现一行 `[WARN] PlatformUtil init:` 是**正常的**(就是 Steam 被跳过),不是报错。

**唯一 caveat**:我是代码审查得出的结论,没实跑(这环境没游戏 DLL)。还有个非 mac 特有的风险——IL patch 是按方法名匹配的,如果某次游戏更新改了方法名会出现 `Applied 0 patches`,但那是版本漂移问题不是 Mac 问题。

所以 **回到你 Q1 提的 determinism**:上面第 2-3 步如果在你 Mac 上跑通,我就接着让你跑那个"同 seed + 同固定动作 → 同 state hash"的复现性检查——这是 LLM 完全不参与的纯环境测试,也是整个 benchmark 的地基。

@Codex blocker 基本清掉了——人类的 MacBook 就是实验机,sts2-cli 原生支持 Apple Silicon。你把那 19 条 patch notes 的 URL 表贴出来,我这边就派 subagent 跑 balance-relevant 改动统计(剥 bugfix/UI/art),把 STS2 的 per-patch patch-size 权重标定出来,补上 STS1 给不了的那一块。

@Claude 补两点：

**同 seed 不是为了消除 LLM 随机性，而是先消除环境随机性。**  
流程应分三层：  
1. 固定 seed + 固定动作序列，验证 STS2 环境 determinism。  
2. LLM eval 尽量 `temperature=0`，或记录 model sampling seed；做不到就多次重复。  
3. baseline / insight / shuffled-insight 全部跑同一批 held-out seeds，用 paired delta 抵消环境方差。

Fetch and parse the Slay the Spire 2 (STS2) Early Access patch notes listed below, and extract ONLY the **balance-relevant** gameplay changes — stripping out bugfixes, UI/UX, art/visual, audio, localization, map-generation/tech, and performance lines. The goal is to characterize STS2's *per-patch balance-change volume* during Early Access, to calibrate a synthetic "drift generator" for a research benchmark. We already have a STS1 prior for delta magnitudes and change-type mix; what we specifically need from STS2 is the **per-patch count distribution of strategy-relevant changes** during the live EA rebalancing period.

## Patch notes to fetch (19 entries)
| date | version | URL |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-03-06 | v0.98.1 | https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/2868840/view/519740319207522938 |

Use WebFetch on each URL. If a Steam URL is JS-rendered/blocked, try the SteamDB mirror or a WebSearch for that version's patch notes. For v0.104.0 use the SteamDB link; for v0.105.1 use the PatchBot link. Report any URL you couldn't retrieve rather than guessing its contents.

## For each patch, classify each balance-relevant change using this schema (same as our STS1 dataset):
1. **entity_type**: card / relic / potion / enemy / boss / event / map / economy
2. **change_type**: numeric_tweak / cost_tweak / keyword_or_mechanic_rewrite / add / remove / replace
3. **magnitude**: the numeric delta where stated (damage, block, cost, HP, etc.), absolute and relative% if computable
4. **affected_archetype**: if identifiable
5. **rule_invalidation_likelihood (RIL)**: low / medium / high (numeric→low, cost/rarity/economy→medium, rewrite/add/remove/replace→high)

Explicitly EXCLUDE and do NOT count: bugfixes, crash fixes, UI/UX, art/visual, audio, text/localization, map-generation/seeding tech, performance, save/load, multiplayer netcode — unless a "fix" actually changes a card/relic/enemy's gameplay numbers or behavior in a way that alters strategy (in which case count it and flag it as fix-with-balance-impact).

## Deliverables (the per-patch balance-change count is THE key output)
A) **Per-patch table**: for each of the 19 patches, give `version | date | total_lines (approx) | balance_relevant_count | breakdown by entity_type | breakdown by change_type | # high-RIL changes`. If a patch is pure hotfix/bugfix with ~0 balance changes, record that (it's an important data point).

B) **Aggregate STS2 EA distribution** (the calibration target):
   - balance-relevant changes per patch: mean / median / range, and note the bimodal split if present (small hotfix vs major rebalance)
   - what fraction of patches are "major rebalance" (e.g. ≥15 balance changes) vs "small/hotfix" — this sets the patch-size mode weights for the generator
   - change_type proportions among balance changes (compare qualitatively to STS1's ~60% numeric / 13% rewrite / 11% add / 8% cost / 8% replace)
   - entity_type proportions (compare to STS1's card 62% / relic 18% / potion 9%)
   - high-RIL event frequency: how often does STS2 do a mechanic-rewrite / card-remove / boss-replace per patch? (STS1's post-launch did this rarely; we suspect STS2 EA does it much more often)
   - the v0.105.0 Doormaker→Aeonglass boss replacement: document it specifically as the flagship real-drift case-study (what exactly changed, and what kinds of learned strategy it would invalidate)

C) A 3-4 sentence **calibration conclusion**: should the generator's "major rebalance" mode be the common case or the rare case for STS2 EA? How do STS2's per-patch balance volumes compare to STS1's (median ~4-6 balance items/patch, big rebalances rare)?

Format as clean markdown: per-patch table first, then aggregate distribution, then the v0.105.0 case study, then the calibration conclusion. Flag any patch whose notes you couldn't fully retrieve.

content.text:
I now have comprehensive coverage across multiple corroborating sources. I have everything needed to compile the deliverables. Let me note the data-quality caveats and assemble the report.

I was unable to load the raw Steam news pages (JS-rendered, returned only chrome) and PatchBot/SteamDB article bodies (JS-rendered / 403). I reconstructed all balance data from corroborating community trackers (slaythespire.wiki.gg, sts2.gg, slaythetierlist.com, sts2companion.com, Untapped.gg) plus news coverage (Kotaku, PCGamesN, GameRant). Two patches (v0.107.0, late-May "May bug fixes") have no per-line tracker detail yet; I characterize them from consistent multi-source summaries.

---

# STS2 Early Access Balance-Change Volume Analysis

**Purpose:** calibration target for the synthetic drift generator — per-patch count distribution of strategy-relevant changes during the live EA rebalancing period (Mar–Jun 2026).

**Data-quality note:** Raw Steam/PatchBot/SteamDB article bodies were JS-rendered or 403-blocked via WebFetch. All balance lines below are reconstructed from corroborating community patch-note trackers (slaythespire.wiki.gg, sts2.gg, slaythetierlist.com, sts2companion.com, sts2.untapped.gg) and press coverage. Counts marked ~ are best estimates; where two trackers disagreed I used the wiki's per-bullet classification as primary. Patches flagged **[low-confidence]** had only summary-level data available.

---

## A) Per-Patch Table

| version | date | total_lines (approx) | balance_relevant_count | entity_type breakdown | change_type breakdown | # high-RIL |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **v0.98.1** | 03-06 | ~8 | **0** | — | — (pure day-one hotfix) | 0 |
| **v0.98.2** | 03-07 | ~10 | **0–1** | enemy?×1 | mostly bugfix/localization; "minor tweaks" unspecified | 0 |
| **v0.98.3** | 03-10 | ~6 | **0** | — | pure softlock/crash hotfix | 0 |
| **v0.99 (.0)** | 03-13 | ~30 | **1** | economy/system×1 (HP cap 999,999,999) | keyword/mechanic rewrite×1 | 1 |
| **v0.99.1 beta** | 03-14 | ~12 | **0–1** | — | bugfix + art; HP-cap groundwork | 0 |
| **v0.99.1 main** | 03-17 | ~15 | **1** | economy/system×1 (HP cap → main) | rewrite×1 (re-counts the same cap) | 1 |
| **v0.100.0** | 03-20 | ~89 | **~51** | card-heavy (IC/Silent/Regent), enemy, economy, multiplayer | rewrite-heavy: many reworks (Dominate, Stoke, Expect a Fight, Spite, Doormaker), numeric, cost, economy | **~18** |
| **v0.101.0** | 03-27 | ~58–74 | **~28** | card, relic, enemy, economy | reverts (Prepared, Capture Spirit, Borrowed Time), reworks (Arsenal, Pendulum, Doormaker), numeric, cost | **~12** |
| **v0.102.0** | 04-03 | ~52–62 | **~24** | card, relic, enemy, event, economy | rework (Blade of Ink, Borrowed Time, Doormaker Grasp), numeric, **Ascension 6 Gloom→Inflation** (economy), events | **~9** |
| **v0.103.0** | 04-10 | ~47–63 | **~20** | card, relic (3 new Neow), enemy, economy | add×4 (Not Yet, 3 relics), remove×2 (Grapple, Tunneling Twosome), rarity×2, numeric, rework (Follow Through) | **~9** |
| **v0.103.1** | 04-16 | ~6 | **~1** | card×1 (Not Yet generation restriction) | keyword/gen-rule tweak | 1 |
| **v0.103.2 (main)** | 04-17 | ~large rollup | **~0 net-new** | (consolidates v0.100–v0.103.1 beta into main) | rollup; Ascension 6 Inflation + shop economy reach main | (already counted in betas) |
| **v0.104.0** | 04-24 | ~180 | **~80–95** | card-heavy, enemy, event, economy, multiplayer scaling | Conflagration rework, Drum of Battle rework, Doormaker rework, Skulking Colony nerf, baseline difficulty recalibration, Neow buffs | **~25** |
| **v0.105.0** | 05-08 | ~78 | **~35** | **boss (Doormaker→Aeonglass)**, card (Defect/Regent/Silent), enemy, relic (3 new Neow) | **boss replace×1 (flagship)**, enemy rework (Infested Prism, Haunted Ship, Punch Construct, Skulking Colony), numeric (Defect buffs), add×3 relics | **~14** |
| **v0.105.1** | 05-09 | ~6 | **0** | — | pure hotfix (Aeonglass intent/music/Ceremonial Beast) | 0 |
| **v0.106.0** | 05-21/22 | ~71 | **~28** | enemy-focused, card, relic, economy | enemy rework (Infested Prism, Aeonglass Wither rework, Skulking Colony, Punch Construct), numeric (Pounce, Astral Pulse, Tesla Coil+), rarity (Predator, Follow Through→Scare) | **~10** |
| **v0.106.1** | 05-23 | ~5 | **0** | — | pure hotfix (Aeonglass Wither card fix + localization) | 0 |
| **May bugfix (main)** | 05-29/30 | ~large | **~0 net-new** | (beta→main bugfix rollup) | bugfixes only; balance already in betas | 0 |
| **v0.107.0** | 06-04/05 | ~moderate | **~3–6** **[low-confidence]** | a few card/enemy | "mostly stability: bug fixes, UI/UX/QOL, performance" + "just a few balance changes and art" | **~1** |

**Notes:** v0.103.2 (main) and the late-May "May bug fixes" (main) are **branch-merge rollups** — they push already-counted beta balance changes onto the stable branch and add net-new bugfixes only. For the per-patch *balance volume* distribution they should be treated as ~0 net-new (counting them as major would double-count the beta patches). The live rebalancing happened on the **beta branch** (the v0.100–v0.106 beta line).

---

## B) Aggregate STS2 EA Distribution (the calibration target)

Using the **19 listed entries**, treating the two main-branch rollups as ~0 net-new:

**Balance-relevant changes per patch:**
- **Mean ≈ 18** (dragged up by the four big betas)
- **Median ≈ 3–4** (most entries are hotfixes/rollups)
- **Range: 0 → ~80–95** (v0.104.0 is the largest)

**Strongly bimodal.** Two clean clusters:
- **Hotfix/rollup cluster (~0–6 balance items):** v0.98.1/.2/.3, v0.99/.99.1 (×2), v0.103.1, v0.103.2-rollup, v0.105.1, v0.106.1, May-bugfix-rollup, v0.107.0 — **~11 of 19 entries (~58%)**.
- **Major-rebalance cluster (≥15 balance items):** v0.100.0, v0.101.0, v0.102.0, v0.103.0, v0.104.0, v0.105.0, v0.106.0 — **~7 of 19 entries (~37%)**.
- Essentially nothing in the middle (5–15 band is empty). This is the cadence signature: a substantial beta drop every ~1–2 weeks, padded with hotfixes/rollups.

**Major-rebalance fraction:** **~37% of all entries**, but **~7 of 7 of the scheduled "real" weekly/bi-weekly beta drops are major.** Within the regular release cadence (excluding emergency hotfixes and merge rollups), the **major-rebalance mode is the *common* case, not the rare one.**

**change_type proportions among balance changes (STS2 vs STS1 prior):**

| change_type | STS2 EA (est.) | STS1 prior |
|---|---|---|
| numeric_tweak | ~45% | ~60% |
| keyword/mechanic_rewrite | ~22% | ~13% |
| add | ~10% | ~11% |
| cost_tweak | ~8% | ~8% |
| replace | ~6% (incl. boss replace) | ~8% |
| remove | ~6% | (rare) |
| rarity-shift (medium-RIL) | ~3% | — |

STS2 EA shifts noticeably **away from pure numeric tweaks and toward rewrites/removes** vs the STS1 post-launch prior — consistent with an unfinished game still reworking core mechanics.

**entity_type proportions (STS2 vs STS1):**

| entity_type | STS2 EA (est.) | STS1 prior |
|---|---|---|
| card | ~58% | ~62% |
| enemy/boss | ~22% | (low) |
| relic | ~10% | ~18% |
| event | ~4% | — |
| economy/system | ~4% | — |
| potion | ~2% | ~9% |

Card-dominant like STS1, but STS2 EA touches **enemies/bosses far more often** (Doormaker alone was reworked or replaced in v0.100, v0.101, v0.102, v0.103, v0.104, then deleted in v0.105 — six consecutive patches), and **potions much less**.

**High-RIL event frequency:** STS2 EA does mechanic-rewrites / card-removes / boss-replaces **constantly** — roughly **9–25 high-RIL changes in every major beta**, and at least one in several hotfixes. Concretely: a full boss rework/replace in 6 straight patches, card removals (Grapple, Tunneling Twosome), an Ascension-modifier rewrite (Gloom→Inflation), and frequent card reworks (Dominate, Stoke, Conflagration, Drum of Battle, Blade of Ink, Follow Through→Scare). This is **far more frequent than STS1 post-launch**, which did high-RIL events rarely.

---

## v0.105.0 Case Study — Doormaker → Aeonglass (flagship real-drift event)

**What changed:** The entire **Act 3 boss Doormaker was deleted and replaced with a brand-new boss, Aeonglass.** Dev rationale: Doormaker was "over the complexity threshold of what we want and had lingering issues… starting over fresh."

**Aeonglass mechanics (new):**
- A floating hourglass that **starts with 3 stacks of Artifact** — blocks the first 3 debuffs you apply (so opening burst-debuff lines whiff).
- **Withering Presence:** for every **4 non-status cards** you play, a **Wither status card** is added to your hand.
- **Wither card:** costs **1 energy**; deals **2 damage to you** if still in hand at end of turn; has **Retain** (won't discard) and **Exhaust** (so you pay 1 mana to clear it). Net: a per-turn mana tax that scales with how many cards you play.
- Alternates between applying **Ebb** (reduces your Strength/Dexterity) and self-buffing Strength.

**Strategy this invalidates (why it's a high-value drift case):**
- **Debuff-front-loading decks** (apply-Weak/Vulnerable openers, poison ramp) lose tempo to the 3 Artifact stacks — any learned policy that opens on debuffs is now wrong on turn 1.
- **High-card-count / "play many cheap cards" engines** (draw-heavy, 0-cost spam, infinite-adjacent builds) are directly punished: more cards played → more Wither → a recurring mana tax, inverting the usual "cards played = good" heuristic.
- **Any boss-specific learned line for Doormaker is fully void** — different HP, intents, debuff schedule, and win condition. This is the single largest invalidation in the dataset: it is not a magnitude shift but a complete entity **replace** (max RIL).

This is the kind of event the generator's high-RIL "boss-replace / mechanic-rewrite" mode should model.

---

## C) Calibration Conclusion

For STS2 Early Access, the generator's **"major rebalance" mode should be the *common* case, not the rare case** — every scheduled weekly/bi-weekly beta drop (~7 of 7 regular cadence releases) carried ≥15 strategy-relevant changes, with hotfixes and main-branch rollups filling the gaps at ~0 balance volume. The distribution is **sharply bimodal** (≈37% major / ≈58% hotfix-or-rollup, near-empty middle), versus STS1's prior where the median patch carried only ~4–6 balance items and big rebalances were rare. STS2 EA's per-patch balance *volume* is therefore roughly **3–4× STS1's median in its major patches**, and crucially its **high-RIL rate is an order of magnitude higher** — mechanic-rewrites, card-removes, and even a full boss-replace recur almost every patch (Doormaker touched 6 patches running, then deleted). Recommend setting the generator's mode weights to ~0.35–0.40 "major rebalance / high-RIL-rich" and ~0.60 "small hotfix / null-drift," and raising the high-RIL event probability well above the STS1 prior to reflect live-EA churn.

**Patches flagged for incomplete retrieval:** v0.98.2 (only "minor tweaks," unspecified), v0.103.2 & May-bugfix (rollups — net-new balance not separately enumerated), and **v0.107.0 (low-confidence: only summary "a few balance changes" available, no per-line tracker data yet).**

| | balance 改动数 | 占比 |
|---|---|---|
| Hotfix/rollup 簇 | ~0-6 项 | ~58%(11/19) |
| **Major rebalance 簇** | **≥15 项**(最大 v0.104.0 ~80-95) | ~37%(7/19) |
| 中间带(5-15) | **几乎空** | — |

**关键:7/7 的常规周更/双周 beta 全是 major。** 排除紧急 hotfix 和 main 分支 rollup,**major rebalance 是 STS2 EA 的常态,不是例外**——和你三层 generator 里"大 patch 罕见"的默认假设正好相反,权重要翻过来。

**两个分布相对 STS1 的偏移(都指向"未完成的游戏在重做核心机制"):**
- change_type:numeric 从 60%→**45%**,rewrite 从 13%→**22%**,remove 从罕见→**6%**
- entity:card 仍主导(58%),但 **enemy/boss 从极低→22%**,potion 从 9%→2%
- **high-RIL 频率比 STS1 高一个数量级**——每个 major beta 有 9-25 个 high-RIL;**Doormaker 连续 6 个 patch 被 rework,第 7 个(v0.105.0)直接删除换 Aeonglass**

**generator 标定结论(直接写进三层参数):**
- patch-size mode 权重 ≈ **0.40 major / 0.60 hotfix-null**(不是 STS1 的"大改罕见")
- high-RIL 事件概率**显著上调**,远超 STS1 prior
- major patch 的 per-patch 体量 ≈ STS1 中位数的 **3-4 倍**

**v0.105.0 当 flagship 真实 drift case 极好用**:Aeonglass 的两个机制精准打击两类学到的策略——① 开局 3 层 Artifact 让所有"开场叠 debuff"套路 turn-1 失效;② "每打 4 张非状态牌塞 1 张 Wither"直接惩罚高出牌引擎,把"多打牌=好"这条启发式反转。这是数据集里最大的 invalidation(完整 entity replace,RIL 拉满),正好示范 high-RIL mode 该建模什么。

**诚实 caveat**(写论文前必须复核):Steam 原始页 JS 渲染抓不动,subagent 是从社区 tracker(wiki.gg/sts2.gg/untapped)重建的,带 `~` 的是估计值;v0.104.0/v0.105.1 是镜像源;v0.107.0 只有 summary。最终定稿要拿原始 Steam news 逐条核一遍。

---

至此**纸面工作全部到位**:novelty wedge、MVP、drift generator 三层参数(STS1 给 delta/change-type 细粒度 + STS2 给 EA patch-size 权重 + v0.105.0 case study)都齐了。

剩下**唯一的实操 gate 在人类的 Mac 上**:跑通 `./setup.sh` + `play_full_run.py 1 Ironclad`,然后做同 seed determinism 检查。这一步过了就进第一周 MVP,过不了就退 MiniSTS。球在人类那边。
